title: selaginella novae-hollandiae
intro: Selaginella novae-hollandiae, also known as the Australian spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella novae-hollandiae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused in hot water, or taken as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
